claims.claim: 5 integrations verified (Resend, AT, HubSpot, Cal.com, Langfuse)

claims.claim: ToneGuard Semantic LLM Check Catch Rate = 0%
claims.provenance: Validation suite of 10 wrong-segment semantic probes using meta-llama/llama-3.3-70b-instruct:free. Model consistently failed to identify mismatch between draft pitch and buyer segment context.

claims.claim: AI Maturity Scorer Exact Accuracy = 72.0%, Within-1 Accuracy = 96.0%
claims.provenance: Evaluation against 25 hand-labeled companies randomly sampled from Crunchbase ODM dataset.

claims.claim: AI Maturity Scorer Score-0 Recall = 100%, False Positive Rate = 0%
claims.provenance: Scorer correctly abstained on 16/16 companies with no public AI signal, preserving brand safety at the cost of mid-tier signal recall.
Run 2026-05-01 via scripts/run_real_ablation.py. Seed 3407. n=50 held-out tasks. ScoringEvaluator deterministic, no LLM inference. Bootstrap n=10,000.

claims.claim: Prompt judge (qwen3-8b zero-shot) held-out accuracy = 0.22, 100% PASS rate
claims.provenance: Run 2026-05-01 via scripts/run_real_ablation.py. Same 50 held-out tasks. qwen/qwen3-8b via OpenRouter. Zero-shot with rubric in prompt. Judge predicted PASS for all 50 tasks.

claims.claim: Delta B lift (rule over prompt) = +0.26, p=0.5499 (n.s.)
claims.provenance: Paired bootstrap, n=10,000, seed 3407. Not significant at p<0.05 due to small held-out size (50 tasks). Rule evaluator still outperforms on every authoring mode.

claims.claim: Preference pairs for DPO training: 279 pairs
claims.provenance: Generated 2026-05-01. Generation: openai/gpt-4o-mini. Judge filter: meta-llama/llama-3.1-70b-instruct. Leakage prevention: different model families (Li et al. 2025). Contamination: 0 n-gram violations vs held-out.
Counted 2026-05-01. Authoring modes: programmatic (≈30%), llm_synthesis (≈25%), hand_authored (≈15%), supplemental/other (≈30%).
